question: What is the man doing with the microphone?
gold_answer: He is turning the microphone to the audience so they can sing along.
answer_choices: He is turning the microphone to the audience so they can sing along.
He is holding the microphone to his mouth.

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: The man is holding the microphone close to his mouth, singing into it.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: The man is turning the microphone toward the audience, not singing into it.

inpaint_prompt_used: The man is holding the microphone close to his mouth, singing into it.
negative_prompt_used: The man is turning the microphone toward the audience, not singing into it.
